Explanation: The evidence shows that Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer (MGM) was founded in 1924 [52010], satisfying the "before 1925" requirement. MGM operated in multiple locations, including Beverly Hills and Las Vegas (the latter being a city with more than three lakes). MGM was acquired and occupied by other companies, especially after its 2010 bankruptcy [52010]. Kirk Kerkorian, a major owner and CEO, died in 2015, matching the CEO death in the 2010s. While the clue about the CEO fleeing a city with a 2011 population of 1.6–2.7 million is less directly confirmed, all other clues fit MGM best. I agree with Agents 2 and 3 based on the evidence.
Exact Answer: Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer (MGM)
Confidence: 90%
